prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年电子科技大学在上海市综合类最低录取位次分别为约4094名、3780名、3404名、3250名、3396名。2021至2024年呈持续前移趋势（位次数字从4094降至3250），2025年出现小幅后移至3396名，近两年位次在3250–3400区间波动，2025年基准位次为3396名；该校在上海市综合类招生计划：2021–2023年均为8人，2024–2025年增至10人；2026年计划大幅扩招至15人，较2025年增加5人（增幅50%），扩招幅度显著，对竞争格局产生重要影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 电子科技大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年位列第33名（2021年第31名、2023年第28名、2025年第33名），排名稳定在30名左右，属于国内顶尖理工类高校；2026年声誉评价为偏负面，涉及学生困难认定事件及副教授师德失范事件各1起，可能对报考心理产生轻微负面影响；抖音热度排名第33位（较热），短视频平台曝光度较高；2022年曾出现投档线异常信号，被考生视为"黑马"，但近年未见明显断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，电子科学与技术、信息与通信工程获评A+，计算机科学与技术获评A，仪器科学与技术、光学工程、管理科学与工程获评A-。招生专业中电子信息类（信息与通信）对应A+学科，工科试验班（电子工程类）对应A+学科，计算机类对应A学科，学科实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信类专业2024年热度为"高热推荐"，计算机类持续"高热推荐"，电气工程及其自动化"高热推荐"，均为当前最热门工科方向，对电子科技大学形成正面报考吸引力。上海市2026年普通高考考生总数约66700人，较2025年（49276人）增加约35%，考生规模大幅增长，竞争加剧。；电子科技大学位于四川省成都市，距上海较远，属于跨省报考。该校在上海市招生占比极小（约0.1%级别），上海考生跨省报考电子科技大学需综合考虑地域偏好。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次3396名、2026年招生计划大幅扩招50%、上海市考生总数增长约35%导致竞争加剧、学校声誉偏负面轻微影响、电子信息/计算机类专业持续高热等因素，考虑考生增量带来的竞争加剧效应，预测位次小幅前移至4365名（位次数字减小，竞争略加剧）。预测最低位次约4365名，区间3865–4865名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机类（含计算机科学与技术、网络空间安全、数据科学与大数据技术、人工智能）
- 电子信息类（信息与通信）（含电子信息工程、通信工程、网络工程、物联网工程、信息对抗技术）
- 工科试验班（电子工程类）（含电子科学与技术、电磁场与无线技术）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 电子信息类（光电集成与光网络）（含光电信息科学与工程、信息工程）
- 工科试验班（机器人、电气信息、智能制造）（含机械设计制造及其自动化、电气工程及其自动化、工业工程、机器人工程、智能电网信息工程）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 经济管理试验班（管理与电子工程双学位）（含电子信息工程、电子商务、工商管理（数智管理与商业分析））。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次4365名位于区间3865–4865名之间。位次在3865名以内可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（计算机类、电子信息类信息与通信方向、工科试验班电子工程类）；位次在3865–4365 名之间建议以二档为主、一档冲刺；位次在4365–4865名之间建议以二档为主、三档保底；位次在4865名以外可考虑三档专业作为稳妥选择。电子科技大学电子信息与计算机学科 实力顶尖，建议结合个人兴趣与学科评估等级综合决策。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for the University of Electronic Science and Technology of China in Shanghai's comprehensive category were approximately 4094, 3780, 3404, 3250, and 3396 respectively. From 2021 to 2024, there was a continuous forward trend (ranking numbers decreased from 4094 to 3250), with a slight backward shift to 3396 in 2025. In the past two years, rankings fluctuated within the 3250–3400 range, with the baseline ranking for 2025 being 3396. The enrollment plan for the university in Shanghai's comprehensive category: from 2021 to 2023, it was 8 students each year; from 2024 to 2025, it increased to 10 students; in 2026, the plan significantly expands to 15 students, an increase of 5 students (50% increase) compared to 2025. The expansion is substantial and will have a significant impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: The University of Electronic Science and Technology of China is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked 33rd (31st in 2021, 28th in 2023, 33rd in 2025), with rankings stable around 30th, placing it among the top domestic science and engineering universities. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, involving one incident of student hardship identification and one incident of associate professor's ethical misconduct, which may have a slight negative impact on application psychology. Douyin popularity ranking is 33rd (relatively hot), with high exposure on short video platforms. In 2022, there was an abnormal signal in the admission cutoff line, considered a "dark horse" by candidates, but no obvious gaps have been recorded in recent years. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Electronic Science and Technology, and Information and Communication Engineering were rated A+, Computer Science and Technology was rated A, and Instrument Science and Technology, Optical Engineering, and Management Science and Engineering were rated A-. Among the enrollment majors, the Electronic Information category (Information and Communication) corresponds to A+ disciplines, the Engineering Experimental Class (Electronic Engineering) corresponds to A+ disciplines, and the Computer category corresponds to A disciplines, highlighting strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity of Electronic Information/Communication majors was "highly recommended hot", Computer majors continued to be "highly recommended hot", and Electrical Engineering and Automation was "highly recommended hot", all being the most popular engineering directions currently, creating a positive attraction for applications to the University of Electronic Science and Technology of China. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Shanghai is approximately 66,700, an increase of about 35% compared to 2025 (49,276), leading to a significant increase in candidate numbers and intensified competition. The University of Electronic Science and Technology of China is located in Chengdu, Sichuan Province, far from Shanghai, making it a cross-province application. The university's enrollment proportion in Shanghai is very small (about 0.1% level), so Shanghai candidates applying cross-province to the University of Electronic Science and Technology of China need to consider regional preferences comprehensively.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 3396, the significant 50% expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan, the approximately 35% increase in the total number of Shanghai candidates leading to intensified competition, the slight negative impact of the school's reputation, and the sustained high popularity of Electronic Information/Computer majors, and taking into account the intensified competition effect from the increase in candidates, the predicted ranking slightly moves forward to 4365 (ranking number decreases, competition slightly intensifies). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4365, with a range of 3865–4865.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Computer Category (including Computer Science and Technology, Cyberspace Security, Data Science and Big Data Technology, Artificial Intelligence)
- Electronic Information Category (Information and Communication) (including Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering, Network Engineering, Internet of Things Engineering, Information Countermeasure Technology)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Electronic Engineering) (including Electronic Science and Technology, Electromagnetic Field and Wireless Technology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Electronic Information Category (Optoelectronic Integration and Optical Networks) (including Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, Information Engineering)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Robotics, Electrical Information, Intelligent Manufacturing) (including Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Industrial Engineering, Robotics Engineering, Smart Grid Information Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Economic Management Experimental Class (Management and Electronic Engineering Dual Degree) (including Electronic Information Engineering, E-commerce, Business Administration (Digital Intelligence Management and Business Analysis)).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking of 4365 falls within the range of 3865–4865. Candidates with rankings within 3865 can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Computer Category, Electronic Information Category Information and Communication direction, Engineering Experimental Class Electronic Engineering); candidates with rankings between 3865–4365 are advised to focus on Tier 2 as the main choice with Tier 1 as a sprint; candidates with rankings between 4365–4865 are advised to focus on Tier 2 as the main choice with Tier 3 as a safety; candidates with rankings outside 4865 can consider Tier 3 majors as a stable choice. The University of Electronic Science and Technology of China has top-tier strengths in Electronic Information and Computer disciplines. It is recommended to make a comprehensive decision based on personal interests and discipline evaluation grades.

_translation.university_name_en: University of Electronic Science and Technology of China
